narrative:
East Muskingum Local Sd (Musk) school district has 8,179 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.9 percentage points.
